title: Meshy Weapon FK Contract
contract: Manual weapon placement is production truth until explicitly replaced.
WeaponGrip is the authored pure FK socket directly under RightHand; the real sabre mesh is positioned under WeaponGrip/displayRoot by authored attachment offsets only.
Generated Meshy normal clips must not target WeaponGrip or WeaponR for weapon orientation, placement, or rotation.
FPS Weapon.R may be used only as an authoring/reference source; it is not a Meshy runtime acceptance target.
WeaponR may exist only in deprecated or explicitly experimental paths and must not gate green acceptance.
WeaponGrip local position and quaternion under RightHand must remain constant across T-pose, Ready, Walk, Run, and other normal non-weapon-swing clips.
The configured grip and measured visible mesh hilt must agree; runtime must not post-pin a different mesh point to make diagnostics green.
Browser and offline renderers must use the same weapon runtime rules before a visual fix is accepted.
